name: Kids' Set of 2 Refreezable Ice Packs Daisy - Cat & Jack™️: BPA-Free Lunch Accessory
description:
The 2-Pack Flower Refreezable Ice Packs from Cat & Jack™️ is an easy way to keep your kid's beverage and snacks cold. Designed in the shape of a flower, this set of two ice packs is made with BPA-free plastic, are refreezable and can be spot or wipe cleaned for easy maintenance.

Cat & Jack™: Designed for all children so you can trust it's made for yours.
